assumptions: Lever maps to the recruiting archetype (the Greenhouse/ATS/Lever family in references/archetypes.md)
offer approval needs a state-changing tool plus approval blockers, so realism is enterprise rather than starter
commands: npm run generator:scaffold-simulator -- --id lever --name "Lever" --archetype recruiting --realism enterprise
bun tools/ge.mjs pipeline run --scenario InterviewScheduling --systems lever --target-stage preview
